case_title: DOUGLAS ROENICKE VS. TEGSCO, LLC DBA SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY ROENICKE, DOUGLAS AS TO DEFENDANT TEGSCO, LLC DBA SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-16-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT ROENICKE, DOUGLAS RECOVER FROM APPELLANT TEGSCO, LLC DBA SAN FRANCISCO AUTO RETURN $4,358.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,433.00, DAMAGES ARE BASED ON AVERAGE FAIR MARKET VALUE OF $6100.00 LESS STORAGE FEES OF $2367.00, PLUS SALE OF $625.00. APPELLANT SHOULD HAVE KNOWN OWNER'S NAME ON NOTIFICATION BY DMV. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-05-2008 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:57am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, nothing on record, clerk-beth wilber, Dept. 525:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal.
Appellant, Tegsco, LLC appears in Pro Per through Dan Scanlan; respondent, Douglas Roenicke, appears in Pro Per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative. Mr. Roenicke states he believes the filing of the appeal was untimely. Judge Myles determines that that the appeal was filed timely and the case goes foward. Parties then present their respective cases.
11:45am
Matter is submitted. No evidence is identified or retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Continued To Jul-02-08 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 506

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar May-08-2008 Continued To Jun-25-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 506
